barks.text: Heard it was professionals. From the city. They use gloves, you know. That's how you can tell.
An outsider, obviously. No one from Lanternside would. No one from Lanternside COULD — we'd have heard about it at the Percolator by lunch.
They say the little planner opened it early. I say: anyone who laminates that much has nothing to hide. Laminating IS confessing, if you think about it.
Eight years in the chair and suddenly the will's gone missing? I'm not saying. I'm just saying. Somebody's been auditing his window boxes, is all.
Caught him with the shovel IN HIS PAWS. Case closed, I say. ...Well. Except for the part where he didn't have anything. But other than that: closed.
